name: saasaloy-cli
description: Saasaloy CLI + module registry — the tool repo

scripts.play:init: pnpm --filter saasaloy build && node packages/cli/dist/index.js init .dev/playground --force --no-install && cp scripts/saasaloy-shim.sh .dev/playground/saasaloy && chmod +x .dev/playground/saasaloy
scripts.play:reset: pnpm run play:destroy && pnpm run play:init
